3277530.name: Aeonic
3277530.description:
Aeonic is a text based adventure where you experience the thrill of travelling through the entirety of human history, from its beginning to nowadays and the different possible futures.

The game features many big and small historical eras, major historical figures and events on Earth and beyond it.

You will experience smaller stories set in each historical period accompanied with epic illustrations which are a part of a bigger adventure, with multiple endings and where different choices of each era lead to different consequences in the breathtaking story blending into the course of the history.
